name: perf_audit
description: Profile the render pipeline, identify bottlenecks, and optimize

steps.name: capture_baseline
steps.description: Capture current performance baseline with all effects enabled

steps.name: inspect_pipeline
steps.description: Get per-pass timing to identify the slowest passes

steps.name: identify_bottleneck
steps.description: Analyze timing data to find the biggest bottleneck

steps.name: inspect_shader
steps.description: Examine the bottleneck shader's includes and complexity

steps.name: plan_optimization
steps.description: Design the optimization: reduce samples, lower resolution, simplify math

steps.name: implement
steps.description: Apply the optimization to the shader or C++ code

steps.name: validate
steps.description: Compile and validate the optimized shader

steps.name: log_result
steps.description: Log optimization results: what changed, perf improvement, quality impact
